prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年海南省综合类最低录取位次依次约为590→767→797→1271→1682名，整体呈持续后移趋势，近两年加速明显（2024年较2023年后移474名，2025年较2024 年后移411名），2025年基准位次约1682名；该校在海南省综合类招生计划2021–2023年均为14人，2024年增至15人，2025年增至16人，2026年计划维持16人（与 2025年持平），扩招趋势暂停，计划层面未产生额外竞争缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 上海财经大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第35名，近年稳定在33–35 名区间，属于顶尖财经类院校，对高分考生持续具有较强吸引力；2026年高考周期声誉数据中未收录该校重大舆情事件，近年亦无明显负面或断档信号；抖音学 校热度总排名第99位（综合热度13.3万），评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光量处于中低水平，未出现显著报考关注升温迹象；第五轮学科评估中，工商管理、应 用经济学获评A+，理论经济学获评A，统计学获评A-，财经类核心学科实力位居全国前列，对相关专业报考有持续支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济类专业社会热度2 024年为"分化观望"，较2021年"推荐"（72.42）明显降温；会计/财务/审计类2024年回升至"推荐"（61.31）；海南省考生总数2021年52977人持续增长至20 25年67408人，2026年预计约78000人（较2025年增长约15.7%），考生规模大幅扩大将加剧省内竞争；上海财经大学位于上海市，对海南省考生属跨省报考，该校在海南招生占比极小（近年约14–16人），地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续 后移趋势（近两年年均后移约400名）、2026年招生计划与2025年持平、海南省考生总数预计大幅增长约15.7%等因素，竞争压力将进一步加大，推动最低录取位次继续后移。预测 2026年综合类最低录取位次约1732名，位次区间1472–1992名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 会计学
- 财务管理（智能化方向）
- 投资学
- 金融学（双学士学位、金融学和统计学）
- 数据科学与大数据技术（工学）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 法学（涉外法治实验班、财经法治卓越班）
- 数学类（包含专业：数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工商管理（双学士学位、工商管理和统计学）
- 工商管理类（包含专业：工商管理（商务分析）、工商管理（战略与创新创业）、市场营销、人力资源管理）
- 公共管理类（包含专业：行政管理、劳动与社会保障）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约1732名，区间1472–1992名。位次在区间中低位（约1472–1600名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（会计学、金融学等）；位次在区间中位（约1600–1800名）建议以二档为 主、一档适度冲刺；位次在区间高位（约1800–1992名）建议以三档保底为主，兼顾二档中等专业。财经类核心专业（会计、金融）学科实力顶尖但社会热度分化，需结合个人兴 趣与就业预期综合判断。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the comprehensive category in Hainan Province were approximately 590 → 767 → 797 → 1271 → 1682, showing a continuous backward trend with accelerated movement in recent years (2024 moved back 474 places compared to 2023, and 2025 moved back 411 places compared to 2024). The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1682. The enrollment plan for this university in the comprehensive category in Hainan was 14 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 15 in 2024, and to 16 in 2025. The 2026 plan remains at 16 (same as 2025), indicating a pause in the expansion trend, with no additional competition relief from the plan.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai University of Finance and Economics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranked 35th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 33–35 range in recent years. It is a top-tier finance and economics institution, consistently attracting high-scoring students. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, no major public opinion incidents were recorded for this university, and there have been no significant negative or gap signals in recent years. On Douyin, the university's overall popularity ranks 99th (comprehensive popularity 133,000), rated as 'average', indicating medium to low exposure on short video platforms with no significant surge in application interest. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Business Administration and Applied Economics were rated A+, Theoretical Economics was rated A, and Statistics was rated A-, placing the core finance and economics disciplines at the national forefront, providing sustained support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of finance/economics/economy majors in 2024 was 'differentiated and wait-and-see', significantly cooling from 'recommended' (72.42) in 2021. Accounting/finance/auditing majors rebounded to 'recommended' (61.31) in 2024. The total number of examinees in Hainan Province grew from 52,977 in 2021 to 67,408 in 2025, and is expected to be about 78,000 in 2026 (an increase of about 15.7% from 2025), significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition within the province. Shanghai University of Finance and Economics is located in Shanghai, making it an inter-provincial application for Hainan candidates. The university's enrollment in Hainan is very small (about 14–16 students in recent years), so regional preference factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings (an average annual backward movement of about 400 places in the last two years), the 2026 enrollment plan remaining the same as 2025, and the expected significant increase of about 15.7% in the total number of Hainan examinees, competition pressure will further increase, pushing the minimum admission ranking further back. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for the comprehensive category in 2026 will be about 1732, with a ranking range of 1472–1992.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Accounting
- Financial Management (Intelligent Direction)
- Investment
- Finance (Double Bachelor's Degree, Finance and Statistics)
- Data Science and Big Data Technology (Engineering)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Law (International Rule of Law Experimental Class, Finance and Rule of Law Excellence Class)
- Mathematics (Including majors: Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Business Administration (Double Bachelor's Degree, Business Administration and Statistics)
- Business Administration (Including majors: Business Administration (Business Analytics), Business Administration (Strategy and Innovation and Entrepreneurship), Marketing, Human Resource Management)
- Public Administration (Including majors: Administrative Management, Labor and Social Security)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 1732, range 1472–1992. Candidates with rankings in the lower-middle part of the range (about 1472–1600) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Accounting, Finance, etc.); those with rankings in the middle part (about 1600–1800) are advised to mainly target Tier 2 with moderate sprinting for Tier 1; those with rankings in the upper part (about 1800–1992) are advised to mainly use Tier 3 as a safety net, while also considering Tier 2 medium majors. Core finance and economics majors (Accounting, Finance) have top-tier disciplinary strength but differentiated social popularity, requiring comprehensive judgment based on personal interests and employment expectations.

_translation.university_name_en: Shanghai University of Finance and Economics
